oblique-circle-linearization.last_note: Verified the two quadratic eliminations, every determinant-table coefficient, the coefficient-audited certificate, all denominator branches, and the final circle criterion; complete proof solved.
oblique-circle-linearization.summary: Oblique affine coordinates make the circle target linear, leaving explicit ray determinants and cancellation.

trig-sine-factorization.last_note: Verified branch control, closure equations, circle formulas, and midpoint-power reduction; explicit derivation of identity (8) from the two closure residuals remains open.
trig-sine-factorization.summary: Directed sine-law parametrization reduces equal midpoint powers to an explicit factorization by two closure equations.
